---
title: "Describe Sample - Novel GLP1s vs other classes"
author: "Gwen Aubrac"
format: html
embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Create a table of baseline characteristics before weighting. Check the standardized mean differences (SMD) before weighting, after IPTW weighting, and after IPCW + IPCW weighting. 

```{r}
#| label: describe-sample
#### DESCRIBE SAMPLE ####

project_root <- Sys.getenv("PROJECT_ROOT")
if (nchar(project_root) == 0) stop("PROJECT_ROOT is not set. To run this file directly in an R session, source code/00-setup.R first in the same session (it loads .Renviron). Otherwise launch the full pipeline via run_all.R / run_all.command / run_all.bat.")
output_dir      <- Sys.getenv("OUTPUT_DIR",      unset = file.path(project_root, "output"))
main_output_dir <- Sys.getenv("MAIN_OUTPUT_DIR", unset = output_dir)
results_dir <- Sys.getenv("RESULTS_DIR", unset = file.path(project_root, "results", "main"))
is_main <- !nzchar(Sys.getenv("SCENARIO_NAME")) ||
  identical(Sys.getenv("SCENARIO_NAME"), "main")
out_path <- function(name) {
  p <- normalizePath(file.path(output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  normalizePath(file.path(main_output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(table1)
library(smd)
library(openxlsx)

data     <- readRDS(out_path("data_novel.rds"))
data1    <- readRDS(out_path("data1_novel.rds"))
data2    <- readRDS(out_path("data2_novel.rds"))
data3    <- readRDS(out_path("data3_novel.rds"))
cov_list <- readRDS(out_path("cov_list_novel.rds"))

data1$trt <- factor(data1$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("SGLT2 Inhibitors", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))
data2$trt <- factor(data2$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("DPP4 Inhibitors", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))
data3$trt <- factor(data3$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Sulfonylureas", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))

# Recode sex as Male/Female so the table shows both rows
for (dn in c("data", "data1", "data2", "data3")) {
  d <- get(dn)
  g <- toupper(substr(as.character(d$gender), 1, 1))  # "M"/"Male" -> M, "F"/"Female" -> F
  d$gender <- factor(g, levels = c("M", "F"), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
  assign(dn, d)
}

# this function is to only show the rows for cov=1 (to simplify the table)
render_binary <- function(x, ...) {
  y <- table1::render.categorical.default(x, ...)
  lv <- levels(factor(x))
  if (length(lv) == 2 && all(lv %in% c("0", "1"))) {
    y <- tail(y, 1)
    names(y) <- ""
  }
  y
}

# add formatted labels for covariates
labels <- c(
  age = "Age (years)",
  alcohol = "Alcohol use disorders",
  cancer = "Cancer",
  cvd = "Cardiovascular disease",
  ckd = "Chronic kidney disease",
  revas = "Coronary revascularization",
  ampu = "Diabetic amputation",
  retino = "Diabetic retinopathy",
  diab_neuro = "Diabetic neuropathy",
  hypoglyc = "Hypoglycemia",
  dyslipid = "Dyslipidemia",
  eskd = "End-stage kidney disease",
  hepa = "Hepatic disease",
  hyper = "Hypertension",
  ihd = "Ischemic heart disease",
  nafld = "Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease",
  pace = "Use of a pacemaker or defibrillator",
  pvd = "Perivascular disease",
  vhd = "Ventricular heart disease",
  edema = "Edema",
  copd = "COPD",
  apnea = "Sleep apnea",
  thyroid = "Thyroid disorders",
  depression = "Depression",
  anxiety = "Anxiety",
  falls = "Falls",
  fractures = "Fractures",
  care_dependency = "Care dependency and mobility issues",
  malnutrition = "Malnutrition",
  aki = "Acute kidney injury",
  proteinuria = "Proteinuria",
  hf_hosp = "Hospitalization for heart failure",
  hosp_cat = "Number of hospitalizations",
  emerg_cat = "Number of emergency service use",
  statin = "Statins",
  betablocker = "Betablockers",
  arb = "Angiotensin receptor inhibitors",
  thiazide = "Thiazides",
  ccb = "Calcium channel blockers",
  aceinhibitor = "ACE inhibitors",
  insulin = "Insulin",
  metformin = "Metformin",
  diuretic = "Loop diuretic",
  prop_b_q = "ZIP5-level quintile of proportion with a Bachelor's or higher",
  gender = "Sex",
  year = "Initiation year",
  bmi_cat = "BMI category",
  region = "Region",
  race = "Race and ethnicity",
  plan_type = "Insurance plan type"
)

# apply labels to the datasets
for (var in names(labels)) {
  label(data[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data1[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data2[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data3[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
}

# and define the order in which covariates will be listed in the table:
cov_list <- c(
  # Sociodemographic characteristics
  "age",
  "gender",
  "race",
  "region",
  "prop_b_q",
  "plan_type",
  "year",
  "bmi_cat",
  "hosp_cat",
  "emerg_cat",

  # Comorbidities (alphabetical by label)
  "alcohol",
  "aki",
  "anxiety",
  "cancer",
  "care_dependency",
  "cvd",
  "ckd",
  "copd",
  "revas",
  "depression",
  "ampu",
  "diab_neuro",
  "retino",
  "dyslipid",
  "edema",
  "eskd",
  "falls",
  "fractures",
  "hepa",
  "hf_hosp"
  "hypoglyc",
  "hyper",
  "ihd",
  "malnutrition",
  "nafld",
  "proteinuria",
  "pvd",
  "apnea",
  "thyroid",
  "pace",
  "vhd",

  # Concomitant medications
  "aceinhibitor",
  "arb",
  "betablocker",
  "ccb",
  "insulin",
  "metformin",
  "statin",
  "thiazide",
  "diuretic"
)


# make table 1 for entire sample
tab1_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(cov_list, collapse = " + "), " | index_class"))

tab1_data <- table1(
  tab1_formula,
  data = data,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of All Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary
)

tab1_data
write.table(tab1_data, file.path(results_dir, "tab1.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")

# table 1 for specific comparisons:
tab1_formula_new <- (tab1_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(cov_list, collapse = " + "), " | trt")))

# novel GLP1s vs sglt2

# compute crude and weighted SMDs for each covariate
compute_smd <- function(var, data, weights = NULL) {
  round(smd(data[[var]], g = data$trt, w = weights)$estimate, 3)
}

crude_smd <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data1)
iptw_smd <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data1, weights = data1$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data1 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data1,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs SGLT2 Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD" = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD" = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data1
write.table(tab1_data1, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data1.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")


library(tidysmd)

sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d1.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data1, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()

# novel GLP1 vs dpp4
rm(crude_smd, iptw_smd, crude_smd_lookup, iptw_smd_lookup)
gc()
crude_smd  <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data2)
iptw_smd   <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data2, weights = data2$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup  <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data2 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data2,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs DPP4 Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD"  = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD"   = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data2
write.table(tab1_data2, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data2.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")


sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d2.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data2, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()


# novel GLP1s vs sulfos
rm(crude_smd, iptw_smd, crude_smd_lookup, iptw_smd_lookup)
gc()
crude_smd  <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data3)
iptw_smd   <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data3, weights = data3$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup  <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data3 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data3,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs Sulfonylureas Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD"  = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD"   = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data3
write.table(tab1_data3, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data3.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")

sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d3.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data3, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()
```


## FINAL TABLE 1 FOR THE MANUSCRIPT

```{r}
#| label: save-final-table1
#### SAVE FINAL TABLE 1 ####

tab1_data1_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data1)
colnames(tab1_data1_new) <- c("var", "sglt2", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

tab1_data2_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data2)
colnames(tab1_data2_new) <- c("var", "dpp4", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

tab1_data3_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data3)
colnames(tab1_data3_new) <- c("var", "sulfo", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

final_tab1 <- data.frame(
  var = tab1_data1_new$var,
  glp1 = tab1_data1_new$glp1, 
  sglt2 = tab1_data1_new$sglt2,
  smd_sglt2 = tab1_data1_new$smd_iptw,
  dpp4 = tab1_data2_new$dpp4,
  smd_dpp4 = tab1_data2_new$smd_iptw,
  sulfo = tab1_data3_new$sulfo,
  smd_sulfo = tab1_data3_new$smd_iptw
)

write.csv(
  final_tab1,
  file.path(results_dir, "final_tab1.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Manuscript table 1: only written on the main run; sensitivity scenarios
# skip this so they don't overwrite main's manuscript copy.
if (is_main) {
manuscript_tab_dir <- file.path(project_root, "manuscript", "tables")
dir.create(manuscript_tab_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

manuscript_tab1 <- final_tab1[, c("var", "glp1",
                                  "sglt2", "smd_sglt2",
                                  "dpp4", "smd_dpp4",
                                  "sulfo", "smd_sulfo")]
smd_cols <- c("smd_sglt2", "smd_dpp4", "smd_sulfo")  # IPTW SMD value columns
val_cols <- c("glp1", "sglt2", "dpp4", "sulfo")      # N (%) / mean (SD) cells

# Formatting to table1: indentation under category levels
.raw   <- manuscript_tab1$var
.trim  <- trimws(.raw)
.indented <- grepl("^[[:space:]]", .raw)
row_type <- ifelse(.trim == "", "info",
             ifelse(.indented, "sub", "var"))

# Capitalize the first letter of ALL-CAPS subcategory labels (e.g. race/ethnicity,
# region, insurance plan type). 
title_case <- function(s) paste0(toupper(substr(s,1,1)), tolower(substr(s,2,nchar(s))))
caps_sub <- .indented & grepl("^[A-Z ]+$", .trim) & grepl("[A-Z]", .trim)
for (i in which(caps_sub)) {
  lead <- sub("^([[:space:]]*).*$", "\\1", manuscript_tab1$var[i])
  manuscript_tab1$var[i] <- paste0(lead, title_case(.trim[i]))
}

# Add header rows for groups of variables
section_first <- c(
  "Sociodemographic characteristics" = labels[["age"]],
  "Comorbidities"                     = labels[["alcohol"]],
  "Medication use"                    = labels[["aceinhibitor"]]
)
blank_row <- manuscript_tab1[1, , drop = FALSE]
blank_row[1, ] <- ""
out <- vector("list", 0L); out_type <- character(0)
for (i in seq_len(nrow(manuscript_tab1))) {
  hit <- match(.trim[i], section_first)
  if (!is.na(hit)) {
    hrow <- blank_row; hrow$var <- names(section_first)[hit]
    out <- c(out, list(hrow)); out_type <- c(out_type, "section")
  }
  out <- c(out, list(manuscript_tab1[i, , drop = FALSE]))
  out_type <- c(out_type, row_type[i])
}
manuscript_tab1 <- do.call(rbind, out)
row_type <- out_type

# SMDs round to 3 decimals, and "0" means  true value is <0.001
for (cc in smd_cols) {
  z <- manuscript_tab1[[cc]] == "0"
  manuscript_tab1[[cc]][z] <- "<0.001"
}

# Add thousands separators to integers with 4+ digits inside N (%) 
add_commas <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(s) {
    if (is.na(s)) return(s)
    m <- gregexpr("(?<![.\\d])\\d{4,}(?!\\d)", s, perl = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (m[1] == -1L) return(s)
    starts <- as.integer(m); lens <- attr(m, "match.length")
    for (j in rev(seq_along(starts))) {
      num <- as.integer(substr(s, starts[j], starts[j] + lens[j] - 1L))
      s <- paste0(substr(s, 1L, starts[j] - 1L),
                  formatC(num, big.mark = ",", format = "d"),
                  substr(s, starts[j] + lens[j], nchar(s)))
    }
    s
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
manuscript_tab1[val_cols] <- lapply(manuscript_tab1[val_cols], add_commas)

# Footnote for "Age (years)" row (footnote b).
age_rows <- grepl("^[[:space:]]*Age \\(years\\)\\s*$", manuscript_tab1$var)
manuscript_tab1$var[age_rows] <- sub("(Age \\(years\\))", "\\1 b",
                                     manuscript_tab1$var[age_rows])

# Footnote for "IPTW SMD" header (footnote a).
colnames(manuscript_tab1) <- c("Variable",
                                "GLP-1 Agonists",
                                "SGLT2 Inhibitors", "IPTW SMD a",
                                "DPP4 Inhibitors",  "IPTW SMD a",
                                "Sulfonylureas",    "IPTW SMD a")

# Append footnote rows at the bottom of the table.
footnotes <- as.data.frame(
  matrix("", nrow = 2, ncol = ncol(manuscript_tab1)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
colnames(footnotes) <- colnames(manuscript_tab1)
footnotes[, 1] <- c(
  "a. Differences between GLP-1 agonists and the comparator medication on the left.",
  "b. For privacy reasons, age is top-coded at 89 years. Patients aged 89 and above are represented as age 89."
)
manuscript_tab1 <- rbind(manuscript_tab1, footnotes)
row_type <- c(row_type, "footnote", "footnote")

#### STYLED XLSX ####
# Times New Roman 12pt; section headers and variable names bold + indented;
# subcategories/values plain and further indented; SMDs > 0.1 bold.
xlsx_tab <- manuscript_tab1
xlsx_tab$Variable <- trimws(xlsx_tab$Variable)

indent_for <- c(info = 0, section = 0, var = 1, sub = 2, footnote = 0)
smd_idx    <- which(colnames(xlsx_tab) == "IPTW SMD a")
nr <- nrow(xlsx_tab); nc <- ncol(xlsx_tab)

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Table 1")
writeData(wb, "Table 1", xlsx_tab, colNames = TRUE)

font <- list(fontName = "Times New Roman", fontSize = 12)
base_style <- do.call(createStyle, c(font, list(valign = "center")))
addStyle(wb, 1, base_style, rows = 1:(nr + 1), cols = 1:nc, gridExpand = TRUE)

# Bold header row
addStyle(wb, 1, do.call(createStyle, c(font, list(textDecoration = "bold"))),
         rows = 1, cols = 1:nc, gridExpand = TRUE)

# Bold only section headers and "parent" variables
val_idx <- which(colnames(xlsx_tab) %in% c("GLP-1 Agonists", "SGLT2 Inhibitors",
                                           "DPP4 Inhibitors", "Sulfonylureas"))
for (i in seq_len(nr)) {
  is_parent <- all(xlsx_tab[i, val_idx] == "" | is.na(xlsx_tab[i, val_idx]))
  bold <- row_type[i] %in% c("section", "var") && is_parent
  st <- do.call(createStyle, c(font, list(
    halign = "left",
    indent = indent_for[[row_type[i]]],
    textDecoration = if (bold) "bold" else NULL
  )))
  addStyle(wb, 1, st, rows = i + 1, cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
}

# Bold SMD cells whose value exceeds 0.1
smd_bold <- do.call(createStyle, c(font, list(textDecoration = "bold")))
for (cc in smd_idx) {
  v <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(xlsx_tab[[cc]]))
  hot <- which(!is.na(v) & v > 0.1)
  for (i in hot) addStyle(wb, 1, smd_bold, rows = i + 1, cols = cc, gridExpand = TRUE)
}

setColWidths(wb, 1, cols = 1, widths = 42)
setColWidths(wb, 1, cols = 2:nc, widths = 18)

saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(manuscript_tab_dir, "table-1-patient-char.xlsx"),
             overwrite = TRUE)
}
```

## E-TABLE 4 TO DESCRIBE WEIGHTS

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

weight_labels <- c(
  siptw = "  Stabilized IPTW (ITT analysis)",
  ipcw_switch = "  IPCW for switch",
  ipcw_disc = "  IPCW for discontinuation",
  swfinal = "  Combined weight (PP analysis)"
)

summarize_weights <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    select(all_of(names(weight_labels))) %>%
    pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "weight", values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(weight) %>%
    summarize(
      Mean = mean(value,   na.rm = TRUE),
      Min = min(value,    na.rm = TRUE),
      Max = max(value,    na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      Q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(weight = factor(weight, levels = names(weight_labels))) %>%
    arrange(weight) %>%
    mutate(
      across(c(Mean, Min, Max, Median, Q1, Q3), ~ sprintf("%.2f", .x)),
      Weight = weight_labels[as.character(weight)],
      IQR = paste0(Q1, "\u2013", Q3)
    ) %>%
    select(Weight, Mean, Min, Max, Median, IQR)
}

# Helper: a full-width section header row (label in Weight, blanks elsewhere)
header_row <- function(label) {
  tibble(Weight = label, Mean = "", Min = "", Max = "", Median = "", IQR = "")
}

# Map each dataframe to its cohort header
datasets <- list(
  "GLP-1 vs SGLT2" = data1,
  "GLP-1 vs DPP4" = data2,
  "GLP-1 vs sulfonylureas" = data3
)

e_tab4 <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(datasets), function(nm) {
    bind_rows(header_row(nm), summarize_weights(datasets[[nm]]))
  })
)

e_tab4

write.csv(
  e_tab4,
  file.path(manuscript_tab_dir, "etable-4-weights.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
